targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  ROUND((SUM(charge_energy_added) / NULLIF(SUM(charge_energy_used), 0) * 100)::numeric, 1) AS "Avg Efficiency [%]"
FROM charging_processes
WHERE car_id = $car_id
  AND $__timeFilter(start_date)
  AND charge_energy_added > 0
  AND charge_energy_used > 0

panels.title: Avg Charging Efficiency
panels.description: Overall charging efficiency calculated as energy added divided by energy used. Values below 100% indicate charging losses.
Average SOC increase per charge session. Deeper charges provide more accurate capacity estimates.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  ROUND(AVG(end_battery_level - start_battery_level)::numeric, 0) AS "Avg Depth [%]"
FROM charging_processes
WHERE car_id = $car_id
  AND $__timeFilter(start_date)
  AND charge_energy_added > 0
  AND end_battery_level > start_battery_level
  AND duration_min > 10

panels.title: Avg Charge Depth

panels.description: Per-session estimated capacity over time. Each point represents one charge session's calculated battery capacity.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  cp.start_date AS time,
  ROUND((cp.charge_energy_added / NULLIF((cp.end_battery_level - cp.start_battery_level)::numeric / 100.0, 0))::numeric, 1) AS "Est. Capacity [kWh]",
  (cp.start_battery_level)::text || '% → ' || (cp.end_battery_level)::text || '%' AS "SOC Range"
FROM charging_processes cp
WHERE cp.car_id = $car_id
  AND $__timeFilter(cp.start_date)
  AND cp.charge_energy_added > 0
  AND cp.end_battery_level > cp.start_battery_level
  AND (cp.end_battery_level - cp.start_battery_level) > 10
  AND cp.duration_min > 10
ORDER BY cp.start_date

panels.title: Charge Sessions & Capacity

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  cp.start_date AS time,
  ROUND((cp.charge_energy_added / NULLIF(cp.charge_energy_used, 0) * 100)::numeric, 1) AS "Efficiency [%]"
FROM charging_processes cp
WHERE cp.car_id = $car_id
  AND $__timeFilter(cp.start_date)
  AND cp.charge_energy_added > 0
  AND cp.charge_energy_used > 0
ORDER BY cp.start_date

SELECT
  $__timeGroup(cp.start_date, '30d') AS time,
  ROUND(AVG((cp.charge_energy_added / NULLIF(cp.charge_energy_used, 0) * 100))::numeric, 1) AS "30-Day Avg [%]"
FROM charging_processes cp
WHERE cp.car_id = $car_id
  AND $__timeFilter(cp.start_date)
  AND cp.charge_energy_added > 0
  AND cp.charge_energy_used > 0
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Charging Efficiency Trend
panels.description: Per-session charging efficiency (blue) with 30-day rolling average (orange dashed).

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  CASE WHEN (end_battery_level - start_battery_level) > 30 THEN 'Deep (>30pp)' ELSE 'Shallow (≤30pp)' END AS "Type",
  COUNT(*) AS "Sessions"
FROM charging_processes
WHERE car_id = $car_id
  AND $__timeFilter(start_date)
  AND charge_energy_added > 0
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Deep vs Shallow Charging
panels.description: Share of sessions with SOC delta above 30pp (deep — better for capacity estimates) vs. below (shallow).

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM charges c WHERE c.charging_process_id = cp.id AND c.fast_charger_present = true LIMIT 1) THEN 'DC Fast' ELSE 'AC' END AS "Type",
  COUNT(*) AS "Sessions"
FROM charging_processes cp
WHERE cp.car_id = $car_id
  AND $__timeFilter(cp.start_date)
  AND cp.charge_energy_added > 0
GROUP BY 1

panels.title: AC vs DC Charging
panels.description: Number of charging sessions split by charger type: AC (home/Level 2) vs. DC Fast (Supercharger, CCS).

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM charges c WHERE c.charging_process_id = cp.id AND c.fast_charger_present = true LIMIT 1) THEN 'DC Fast' ELSE 'AC' END AS "Type",
  ROUND(SUM(cp.charge_energy_added)::numeric, 1) AS "Energy [kWh]"
FROM charging_processes cp
WHERE cp.car_id = $car_id
  AND $__timeFilter(cp.start_date)
  AND cp.charge_energy_added > 0
GROUP BY 1

panels.title: AC vs DC Energy
panels.description: Total energy added, split by AC vs. DC Fast charging.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  cp.start_date AS "Date",
  COALESCE(g.name, a.name, 'Unknown') AS "Location",
  ROUND(cp.charge_energy_added::numeric, 1) AS "Energy Added [kWh]",
  ROUND((cp.charge_energy_added / NULLIF((cp.end_battery_level - cp.start_battery_level)::numeric / 100.0, 0))::numeric, 1) AS "Est. Capacity [kWh]",
  ROUND((cp.charge_energy_added / NULLIF(cp.charge_energy_used, 0) * 100)::numeric, 1) AS "Efficiency [%]",
  cp.start_battery_level || '% → ' || cp.end_battery_level || '%' AS "SOC",
  cp.duration_min AS "Duration [min]",
  CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM charges c WHERE c.charging_process_id = cp.id AND c.fast_charger_present = true LIMIT 1) THEN 'DC' ELSE 'AC' END AS "Type"
FROM charging_processes cp
LEFT JOIN geofences g ON cp.geofence_id = g.id
LEFT JOIN addresses a ON cp.address_id = a.id
WHERE cp.car_id = $car_id
  AND $__timeFilter(cp.start_date)
  AND cp.charge_energy_added > 0
  AND cp.end_battery_level > cp.start_battery_level
  AND (cp.end_battery_level - cp.start_battery_level) > 10
ORDER BY cp.start_date DESC
LIMIT 20

panels.title: Recent 20 Charge Sessions
panels.description: Most recent 20 qualifying charge sessions with full details: date, location, energy, capacity estimate, efficiency, SOC range, duration, and charger type.
Daily energy added stacked by charger type: AC (home/Level 2, green) vs DC Fast (Supercharger, orange).

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroup(cp.end_date, '1d') AS time, ROUND(SUM(cp.charge_energy_added)::numeric, 1) AS "AC" FROM charging_processes cp WHERE cp.car_id = $car_id AND $__timeFilter(cp.start_date) AND cp.charge_energy_added > 0 AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM charges c WHERE c.charging_process_id = cp.id AND c.fast_charger_present = true LIMIT 1) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT $__timeGroup(cp.end_date, '1d') AS time, ROUND(SUM(cp.charge_energy_added)::numeric, 1) AS "DC Fast" FROM charging_processes cp WHERE cp.car_id = $car_id AND $__timeFilter(cp.end_date) AND cp.charge_energy_added > 0 AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM charges c WHERE c.charging_process_id = cp.id AND c.fast_charger_present = true LIMIT 1) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Daily Energy Added (AC vs DC)
Efficiency vs Temperature
panels.description: Charging efficiency distribution by outside temperature. Rows: temperature ranges. Columns: efficiency ranges. Cell color = session count.

targets.rawSql:
WITH sessions AS (
  SELECT
    cp.charge_energy_added / NULLIF(cp.charge_energy_used, 0) * 100 AS efficiency,
    cp.outside_temp_avg AS temp
  FROM charging_processes cp
  WHERE cp.car_id = $car_id
    AND $__timeFilter(cp.start_date)
    AND cp.charge_energy_used > 0
    AND cp.charge_energy_added > 0
    AND cp.outside_temp_avg IS NOT NULL
),
data AS (
  SELECT
    CASE
      WHEN temp < 5 THEN '0-5°C'
      WHEN temp < 10 THEN '5-10°C'
      WHEN temp < 15 THEN '10-15°C'
      WHEN temp < 20 THEN '15-20°C'
      WHEN temp < 25 THEN '20-25°C'
      ELSE '25-30°C'
    END AS temp_range,
    CASE
      WHEN efficiency < 85 THEN '<85%'
      WHEN efficiency < 90 THEN '85-90%'
      WHEN efficiency < 95 THEN '90-95%'
      WHEN efficiency < 100 THEN '95-100%'
      ELSE '>100%'
    END AS eff_range
  FROM sessions
)
SELECT
  t.temp_range AS "Temperature",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE d.eff_range = '<85%') AS "<85%",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE d.eff_range = '85-90%') AS "85-90%",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE d.eff_range = '90-95%') AS "90-95%",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE d.eff_range = '95-100%') AS "95-100%",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE d.eff_range = '>100%') AS ">100%"
FROM (VALUES ('0-5°C'),('5-10°C'),('10-15°C'),('15-20°C'),('20-25°C'),('25-30°C')) AS t(temp_range)
LEFT JOIN data d ON d.temp_range = t.temp_range
GROUP BY t.temp_range
ORDER BY t.temp_range

panels.title: AC Efficiency
panels.description: Average charging efficiency for AC sessions

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  ROUND(AVG(cp.charge_energy_added / NULLIF(cp.charge_energy_used, 0) * 100)::numeric, 1) AS "AC Efficiency [%]"
FROM charging_processes cp
WHERE cp.car_id = $car_id
  AND $__timeFilter(cp.start_date)
  AND cp.charge_energy_used > 0
  AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM charges c WHERE c.charging_process_id = cp.id AND c.fast_charger_present = true LIMIT 1)

panels.title: DC Fast Efficiency
panels.description: Average charging efficiency for DC Fast sessions

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  ROUND(AVG(cp.charge_energy_added / NULLIF(cp.charge_energy_used, 0) * 100)::numeric, 1) AS "DC Efficiency [%]"
FROM charging_processes cp
WHERE cp.car_id = $car_id
  AND $__timeFilter(cp.start_date)
  AND cp.charge_energy_used > 0
  AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM charges c WHERE c.charging_process_id = cp.id AND c.fast_charger_present = true LIMIT 1)

panels.title: Monthly Efficiency Stats
panels.description: Monthly breakdown of charging efficiency, sessions, and energy

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  TO_CHAR(cp.start_date, 'YYYY-MM') AS "Month",
  COUNT(*) AS "Sessions",
  ROUND(AVG(cp.charge_energy_added / NULLIF(cp.charge_energy_used, 0) * 100)::numeric, 1) AS "Avg Efficiency [%]",
  ROUND(SUM(cp.charge_energy_added)::numeric, 1) AS "Total Energy [kWh]",
  ROUND(AVG(cp.duration_min)::numeric, 0) AS "Avg Duration [min]"
FROM charging_processes cp
WHERE cp.car_id = $car_id
  AND $__timeFilter(cp.start_date)
  AND cp.charge_energy_used > 0
  AND cp.charge_energy_added > 0
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1 DESC

SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN duration_min < 15 THEN '<15 min'
    WHEN duration_min < 30 THEN '15-30 min'
    WHEN duration_min < 60 THEN '30-60 min'
    WHEN duration_min < 120 THEN '1-2 hours'
    WHEN duration_min < 240 THEN '2-4 hours'
    ELSE '>4 hours'
  END AS "Duration",
  COUNT(*) AS "Sessions"
FROM charging_processes
WHERE car_id = $car_id
  AND $__timeFilter(start_date)
  AND charge_energy_added > 0
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Efficiency by SOC Range
panels.description: Average charging efficiency at different SOC levels

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN start_battery_level < 20 THEN '0-20%'
    WHEN start_battery_level < 40 THEN '20-40%'
    WHEN start_battery_level < 60 THEN '40-60%'
    WHEN start_battery_level < 80 THEN '60-80%'
    ELSE '80-100%'
  END AS "SOC Range",
  ROUND(AVG(charge_energy_added / NULLIF(charge_energy_used, 0) * 100)::numeric, 1) AS "Avg Efficiency [%]"
FROM charging_processes
WHERE car_id = $car_id
  AND $__timeFilter(start_date)
  AND charge_energy_used > 0
  AND charge_energy_added > 0
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Top/Bottom 10 Sessions by Efficiency
panels.description: Most and least efficient charging sessions

targets.rawSql:
SELECT * FROM (
  SELECT
    cp.start_date AS "Date",
    COALESCE(g.name, a.name, 'Unknown') AS "Location",
    ROUND((cp.charge_energy_added / NULLIF(cp.charge_energy_used, 0) * 100)::numeric, 1) AS "Efficiency [%]",
    ROUND(cp.charge_energy_added::numeric, 1) AS "Energy [kWh]",
    cp.duration_min AS "Duration [min]",
    'Top 10' AS "Category"
  FROM charging_processes cp
  LEFT JOIN geofences g ON g.id = cp.geofence_id
  LEFT JOIN addresses a ON a.id = cp.address_id
  WHERE cp.car_id = $car_id
    AND $__timeFilter(cp.start_date)
    AND cp.charge_energy_used > 0
    AND cp.charge_energy_added > 0
  ORDER BY 3 DESC
  LIMIT 10
) top
UNION ALL
SELECT * FROM (
  SELECT
    cp.start_date AS "Date",
    COALESCE(g.name, a.name, 'Unknown') AS "Location",
    ROUND((cp.charge_energy_added / NULLIF(cp.charge_energy_used, 0) * 100)::numeric, 1) AS "Efficiency [%]",
    ROUND(cp.charge_energy_added::numeric, 1) AS "Energy [kWh]",
    cp.duration_min AS "Duration [min]",
    'Bottom 10' AS "Category"
  FROM charging_processes cp
  LEFT JOIN geofences g ON g.id = cp.geofence_id
  LEFT JOIN addresses a ON a.id = cp.address_id
  WHERE cp.car_id = $car_id
    AND $__timeFilter(cp.start_date)
    AND cp.charge_energy_used > 0
    AND cp.charge_energy_added > 0
  ORDER BY 3 ASC
  LIMIT 10
) bottom
ORDER BY "Category", "Efficiency [%]" DESC

list.definition:
SELECT
    id as __value,
    CASE WHEN COUNT(id) OVER (PARTITION BY name) > 1 AND name IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(name, ' - ', RIGHT(vin, 6)) ELSE COALESCE(name, CONCAT('VIN ', vin)) end as __text
FROM cars
ORDER BY display_priority ASC, name ASC, vin ASC
list.label: Car
list.name: car_id
list.query:
SELECT
    id as __value,
    CASE WHEN COUNT(id) OVER (PARTITION BY name) > 1 AND name IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(name, ' - ', RIGHT(vin, 6)) ELSE COALESCE(name, CONCAT('VIN ', vin)) end as __text
FROM cars
ORDER BY display_priority ASC, name ASC, vin ASC

list.definition:
SELECT
  ROUND(AVG(charge_energy_added / NULLIF((end_battery_level - start_battery_level)::numeric / 100.0, 0))) AS __value,
  CONCAT('Auto (', ROUND(AVG(charge_energy_added / NULLIF((end_battery_level - start_battery_level)::numeric / 100.0, 0))), ' kWh)') AS __text
FROM charging_processes
WHERE car_id = $car_id
  AND charge_energy_added > 0
  AND end_battery_level > start_battery_level
  AND (end_battery_level - start_battery_level) > 30
  AND duration_min > 30
  AND $__timeFilter(start_date)
HAVING COUNT(*) > 3
list.label: Factory Battery Capacity (kWh)
list.name: nominal_capacity
list.query:
SELECT
  ROUND(AVG(charge_energy_added / NULLIF((end_battery_level - start_battery_level)::numeric / 100.0, 0))) AS __value,
  CONCAT('Auto (', ROUND(AVG(charge_energy_added / NULLIF((end_battery_level - start_battery_level)::numeric / 100.0, 0))), ' kWh)') AS __text
FROM charging_processes
WHERE car_id = $car_id
  AND charge_energy_added > 0
  AND end_battery_level > start_battery_level
  AND (end_battery_level - start_battery_level) > 30
  AND duration_min > 30
  AND $__timeFilter(start_date)
HAVING COUNT(*) > 3

list.definition: SELECT efficiency FROM cars WHERE id = $car_id
list.name: efficiency
list.query: SELECT efficiency FROM cars WHERE id = $car_id

title: Charging Efficiency & Details
description: TeslaMate charging efficiency metrics, AC vs DC breakdowns, and individual charge session analysis. Part of Teslamate Ecos custom dashboards — built on a Tesla named Ecos.
